name: Jamon Jamon
description: Discover the taste of Spain with freshly prepared tapas, traditional paellas, premium Iberian ham and sangria by the glass. A relaxed, vibrant atmosphere perfect for sharing food with friends and family.

categories.name: Tapas Frías
categories.description: Cold sharing plates — best enjoyed with a glass of wine

items.name: Jamón Ibérico de Bellota
items.description: Hand-carved acorn-fed Iberian ham, aged 36 months. Silky, nutty, and melt-in-the-mouth. Served with pan con tomate.

items.name: Tabla Ibérica
items.description: A generous board of Jamón Ibérico, Lomo, Salchichón and Chorizo Ibérico. Serves two to share.

items.name: Queso Manchego
items.description: Aged Manchego cheese with membrillo (quince paste), honey drizzle and toasted almonds.

items.name: Boquerones en Vinagre
items.description: White anchovies marinated in white wine vinegar, garlic and parsley. A classic Spanish bite.

items.name: Ensalada Catalana
items.description: Roasted red peppers, grilled aubergine, vine tomatoes, black olives, capers, extra virgin olive oil and sherry vinegar.

categories.name: Tapas Calientes
categories.description: Hot tapas — freshly prepared and served as they're ready

items.name: Pimientos de Padrón
items.description: Lightly pan-fried blistered green peppers, lightly salted, mild and smoky — with the occasional spicy surprise!

items.name: Patatas Bravas
items.description: Crispy fried potatoes with smoky bravas sauce and house aioli. A non-negotiable order.

items.name: Huevos Rotos
items.description: Crispy fried potatoes topped with perfectly fried eggs, lightly broken. Simple perfection.

items.name: Chorizo al Vino
items.description: Savoury Spanish chorizo slow-cooked in rich red wine, bursting with bold, smoky flavours.

items.name: Croquetas de Jamón
items.description: Silky jamón béchamel encased in a golden, crispy crumb. Made fresh every morning. Four pieces.

items.name: Gambas al Pil Pil
items.description: Juicy king prawns sizzling in garlic-infused olive oil with dried chilli and a splash of Manzanilla sherry.

items.name: Calamares a la Romana
items.description: Crispy squid rings in a light tempura batter, served with lemon and house alioli.

items.name: Tortilla Española
items.description: Thick, slowly cooked Spanish omelette with potato and onion. Served at room temperature — the authentic way.

items.name: Albóndigas en Salsa
items.description: Pork and beef meatballs braised in a rich tomato and saffron sauce, topped with fresh parsley.

categories.name: Platos Principales
categories.description: Main courses — generous dishes for the whole table

items.name: Paella Valenciana
items.description: Traditional Valencian rice with free-range chicken, rabbit, green beans, butter beans, rosemary and saffron. Minimum two people.

items.name: Paella Marinera
items.description: Saffron rice with king prawns, mussels, squid, clams and sweet piquillo peppers. Minimum two people.

items.name: Cordero al Horno
items.description: Slow-roasted leg of lamb marinated in thyme, rosemary, red wine and extra virgin olive oil. Served with crispy roasted potatoes and a rich pan jus.

items.name: Lubina a la Plancha
items.description: Grilled sea bass fillet with salsa verde, capers and a saffron-infused olive oil. Served with grilled asparagus.

items.name: Pollo al Piri Piri
items.description: Half chicken marinated in Piri Piri sauce, lemon and garlic, grilled and served with patatas bravas.

categories.name: Postres
categories.description: Homemade desserts — the sweet end to a Spanish feast

items.name: Churros con Chocolate
items.description: Crispy fried dough dusted with cinnamon sugar, served with a thick, warm Spanish dark chocolate dipping sauce.

items.name: Crema Catalana
items.description: Spain's answer to crème brûlée — silky custard with a caramelised sugar crust, scented with orange and cinnamon.

items.name: Tarta de Santiago
items.description: Traditional Galician almond tart dusted with icing sugar in the shape of the Cross of Saint James.

items.name: Helado Artesanal
items.description: Ask your server for today's selection of house-made ice cream. Usually includes Horchata, Turrón and seasonal fruit.

categories.name: Bebidas
categories.description: Drinks — wines, sangria and soft options

items.name: Sangria Roja
items.description: House red wine sangria with Brandy de Jerez, orange, lemon and a dash of cinnamon. Served by the glass or jug.

items.name: Sangria Blanca
items.description: Crisp white wine sangria with peach, mint and elderflower. Light and refreshing.

items.name: Clara con Limón
items.description: Spanish lager topped with freshly squeezed lemon. The perfect terrace drink.

items.name: Mosto de Uva
items.description: Unfermented grape juice — the classic non-alcoholic Spanish bar staple. Red or white.

items.name: Agua de Limón
items.description: House-made still lemonade with fresh lemon, a hint of rosemary and sparkling water.

items.name: Café con Leche
items.description: Strong espresso with steamed milk — the way it's served from Madrid to Malaga.
